vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ và thú vị
vocab.example: We used to have a whale of a time building makeshift forts in the living room using nothing but pillows and blankets.

vocab.meaning: quãng thời gian hạnh phúc nhất trong đời
vocab.example: I was having the time of my life whenever my father took me to the local amusement park on weekends.

vocab.meaning: tràn đầy năng lượng và nhiệt huyết
vocab.example: As a child, I was always full of beans, constantly running around the neighborhood playing tag with my friends.

vocab.meaning: để trí tưởng tượng bay xa/tự do bay bổng
vocab.example: I loved drawing because it allowed me to let my imagination run wild and create monsters that didn't exist.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi nhịp độ (thường là để thư giãn hơn)
vocab.example: After a week of school, going fishing with my grandfather provided a much-needed change of pace.

vocab.word: take to something like a duck to water
vocab.ipa: /teɪk tu ˈsʌmθɪŋ laɪk ə dʌk tu ˈwɔːtər/
vocab.meaning: bắt nhịp với cái gì rất nhanh (như cá gặp nước)
vocab.example: When I first tried swimming at age five, I took to it like a duck to water and never wanted to leave the pool.

vocab.meaning: mải mê suy nghĩ/đắm chìm trong suy nghĩ
vocab.example: I would often be lost in thought while playing with my toy soldiers, inventing complex backstories for each character.

vocab.meaning: đi chơi đêm quậy phá/vui chơi tưng bừng (nghĩa bóng cho việc trẻ con chơi đùa náo nhiệt)
vocab.example: On my birthdays, my cousins and I would essentially paint the town red, running through every arcade in the mall.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng lại những kỷ niệm cũ
vocab.example: Looking at these old board games really makes me want to go down memory lane to when we played them every rainy afternoon.

vocab.word: through the eyes of a child
vocab.meaning: dưới lăng kính của một đứa trẻ (nhìn mọi thứ đầy mới mẻ/kỳ diệu)
vocab.example: Seeing the world through the eyes of a child meant that even a simple trip to the supermarket felt like a grand adventure.
